acceptance_targets: [chapter_17.craft.001] PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173-295 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:399-401, every new publication boundary is introduced through an active clash and followed by a concrete on-page consequence in that paragraph; FAIL if two consecutive paragraphs remain list-only policy prose without embodied reaction.

[chapter_17.booker.001] PASS if the revised chapter shows one clear turning-point reveal that changes the boundary terms exactly once (pre-reveal terms differ from post-reveal terms) and each subsequent beat adds new consequence; FAIL if the same rule is declared in three separate beats without new causal pressure.

[chapter_17.dialogue.001] PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173-205 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:255-305, each speaker has at least one interruption or false start and their lines are distinguishable by lexicon/rhythm on blind read; FAIL if both still rely on interchangeable abstract noun slogans in consecutive turns.

[chapter_17.prose.001] PASS if the revised chapter contains no more than two emotion beats using the exact '[gesture] once' construction and each revised target line uses a distinct beat strategy; FAIL if three or more such constructions remain.

[chapter_17.craft.002] PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:297-321 includes at least two explicit Marisol interior sentences (thought, bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment) separated by dialogue turns; FAIL if the span remains external-only exchange for 10+ consecutive paragraphs.

[chapter_17.craft.003] PASS if the revised intervention includes at least one non-instructional Luis line that reveals personal idiolect/detail and one physical beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:393 that distinguishes him from generic sponsor dialogue; FAIL if all Luis lines remain pure commands/checklist prompts.

[FBK-012] PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6356-6357 no longer uses default flatness wording and instead expresses Gloria's stress through idiolect-consistent diction/rhythm. FAIL if 'went flat' phrasing remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173-295 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:399-401, every new publication boundary is introduced through an active clash and followed by a concrete on-page consequence in that paragraph; FAIL if two consecutive paragraphs remain list-only policy prose without embodied reaction.
findings.problem: Sanitization-by-procedure: at the chapter's emotional peak, confrontation repeatedly collapses into policy-list language and drafting instructions. Summary/protocol wording displaces embodied consequence, which defuses narrative tension exactly where this scene should stay dangerous.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the boundary-setting passage as conflict-in-action at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:177, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:249, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:255, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:281, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:399. Keep one concise terms list only; for each retained rule, attach an immediate interpersonal cost (interruption, refusal, concession, or bodily reaction) in the same beat.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter shows one clear turning-point reveal that changes the boundary terms exactly once (pre-reveal terms differ from post-reveal terms) and each subsequent beat adds new consequence; FAIL if the same rule is declared in three separate beats without new causal pressure.
findings.problem: Leverage stalls through duplicated negotiation loops: Marisol sets boundary terms, restates them in near-identical form, then re-states again after the phone call. The chapter spends too many pages reaffirming known decisions instead of escalating to a single irreversible turn.
findings.rewrite_direction: Consolidate the term-setting arc so one pivot drives consequence: trim duplicate policy beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:177-188 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:249-265, then let the reporter-risk reveal at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:269-276 force the final changed rule at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:283.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173-205 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:255-305, each speaker has at least one interruption or false start and their lines are distinguishable by lexicon/rhythm on blind read; FAIL if both still rely on interchangeable abstract noun slogans in consecutive turns.
findings.problem: Register flattening in high-pressure exchange: Marisol and Gloria repeatedly speak in polished manifesto/legal diction, reducing idiolect separation. The scene needs more colloquial interruption and character-specific lexicon under stress.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revoice the key exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:173-205 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:255-305. Keep Marisol image-driven and self-implicating (high contraction, sensory verbs), keep Gloria compact and labor/practical-detail anchored (moderate contraction, command pivots).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter contains no more than two emotion beats using the exact '[gesture] once' construction and each revised target line uses a distinct beat strategy; FAIL if three or more such constructions remain.
findings.problem: Recurring formula tic: emotional beats repeatedly default to verb-plus-'once' micro-gestures (nodded once, laughed once, shook once). The repetition flattens tonal variance and signals autopilot construction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the repeated beat lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:9, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:87, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:149, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:183, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:345, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:355, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:395 with varied physical action, silence, object interaction, or sentence rhythm.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:297-321 includes at least two explicit Marisol interior sentences (thought, bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment) separated by dialogue turns; FAIL if the span remains external-only exchange for 10+ consecutive paragraphs.
findings.problem: Interiority drought: this 10+ paragraph run plays mostly as external transcript, with minimal focalized thought/sensation. The chapter briefly reads like screenplay coverage instead of close-third fiction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert focalized interior beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:305, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:319 so Marisol's decision cost is experienced, not inferred.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised intervention includes at least one non-instructional Luis line that reveals personal idiolect/detail and one physical beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:393 that distinguishes him from generic sponsor dialogue; FAIL if all Luis lines remain pure commands/checklist prompts.
findings.problem: Luis carries 3+ lines in a pivotal beat but functions almost entirely as procedural command voice, with little independent personal texture. He risks reading as utility mechanism rather than character.
findings.rewrite_direction: Augment Luis's intervention at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:365-389 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:393 with one character-specific metaphor or lived detail tied to his established transit/shift-work register, without reducing urgency.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6356-6357 no longer uses default flatness wording and instead expresses Gloria's stress through idiolect-consistent diction/rhythm. FAIL if 'went flat' phrasing remains.
findings.problem: Recurring default-flatness construction (chapters 14, 15, 17) appears as 'voice went flat with effort,' contributing to cross-chapter reaction sameness. Decision for this chapter: REPLACE.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6356-6357 so Gloria's pressure voice shows up via her chapter-specific register (command shift + practical threat detail) without 'went flat' shorthand.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
